title: Fix `--skills` Routing Misconception + Tighten/Retime capture-adrs
summary: Design specification for three independent fixes to dev-flow: correcting `--skills` routing semantics with an `agent:*` label, tightening ADR capture worthiness criteria, and retiming the ADR capture nudge to fire only on plans.
notes: Document is dated 2026-05-28 and marked 'Draft for review'. It is a prescriptive design specification (not a decision record) that details implementation changes across three independent feature areas. References a canonical spec mirror (2026-05-14-dev-flow-beads-integration-design.md) that must be kept in sync.
